title: MISSION: Flower Garden I
overview: Spy-school washout Lily just accepted a provisional graduation, and she couldn’t be happier! But there’s more to her new assignment (and her new teacher) than meets the eye.

title: MISSION: Flower Garden II
overview: From defeat comes wisdom. To vanquish Klaus, Team Lamplight must learn from their mistakes — but once they enter enemy territory, the time for mistakes will be over.

title: MISSION: Flower Garden III
overview: Impossible Mission or not, it doesn’t make sense for a team that legendary to go down so easily. A traitor betrays his team.

title: FILE: Fool Erna
overview: Nine elite members form a new team called Lamplight, and they’re going to pick up where Inferno left off.

title: FILE: Lamplight Days
overview: With Wunderkind Lily at its head, Lamplight's going to lead the charge. Their inaugural Impossible Mission is just around the corner.

title: FILE: Pandemonium Sybilla
overview: The girls receive some advice: “Deceive each other. Trick each other. Improve each other.”

title: FILE: Meadow Sara
overview: With a ghost on the loose and a literal ticking time bomb, the girls start worrying about the manor's structural integrity.

title: MISSION: Daughter Dearest I
overview: Coming back from a break, everyone is recharged and ready for the next mission. Lamplight's been promoted from a provisional team to an actual team.

title: MISSION: Daughter Dearest II
overview: When you’re a spy, sometimes being stealthy is not enough. You also have to be well fed!

title: MISSION: Daughter Dearest III
overview: During the Pre-Impossible Mission Planning, the assassins make their way into the manor disguised as delivery people.

title: MISSION: Daughter Dearest IV
overview: Lamplight faces a battle they have to win on their own.

title: FILE: Daughter Dearest Grete
overview: This will be the first time in a long while that all nine Lamplight members back together!

title: MISSION: Forgetter I
overview: Sometimes, you have to give yourself a little reward to make it all worth it.

title: MISSION: Forgetter II
overview: Under rare circumstances, cornered spies will turn to desperate acts of violence. All they can do is pray that others don't get dragged into the situation.

title: MISSION: Forgetter III
overview: The team faces a moral dilemma over Matilda’s fate. She may be an enemy spy, but she is also Annette’s mother.

title: MISSION: Forgetter IV
overview: There’s only one way to get Matilda out of a jam and sneaking her into a cargo freighter leaving the port may be the team’s last hope.

title: FILE: Glint
overview: Everyone is starting to slip up and show signs of psychological strain. Everyone, with one exception.

title: FILE: Dreamspeaker Thea
overview: This will be the first time in a long while that all nine Lamplight members back together!

title: FILE: Forgetter Annette
overview: Annette runs out of spending money buying parts for a machine she is building. The solution? She gets a side job!

title: MISSION: Dreamspeaker I
overview: The latest mission is going to involve infiltrating a foreign country. This will be a major trial for Lamplight.

title: MISSION: Dreamspeaker II
overview: The group questions bringing Roland with them. Unfortunately, he’s the only one who knows what Purple Ant looks like and that makes him valuable.

title: MISSON: Dreamspeaker III
overview: Someone once told Miranda that when she was in the depths of despair, a hero would come to save her. Will that be true in practice?

title: MISSION: Dreamspeaker IV
overview: An intense encounter at a bar. Tears are shed. A gun on the table. What is going on here?

title: FILE: Flower Garden Lily
overview: All roads have led to this as Lamplight shines in this thrilling season finale of Spy Classroom.
